title: myriocephalus gascoynensis
intro: Myriocephalus gascoynensis, also known as Gascoyne button, is a small, annual or perennial herb native to Western Australia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of M. gascoynensis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of M. gascoynensis typically involve infusions or tinctures made from its leaves and flowers, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
